title: Luxury Product Advertising
original_prompt: Create a luxury commercial product advertisement with premium studio lighting, elegant composition, refined materials, and strong brand presence.
comfy_positive: luxury commercial product advertising, premium studio lighting, elegant composition, high-end materials, cinematic reflections, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, ultra detailed, clean background, professional product photography
comfy_negative: low quality, blurry, deformed, watermark, distorted logo, misspelled text, jpeg artifacts
native_prompt: Create a high-end commercial product advertisement. Use premium studio lighting, elegant composition, refined materials, subtle reflections, and a clean brand-focused layout. The image should feel luxurious, photorealistic, and suitable for ecommerce or website marketing.

title: Premium AI Technology Poster
original_prompt: Create a premium AI technology poster with a futuristic black-and-gold visual system, clean layout, glowing data elements, and cinematic depth.
comfy_positive: premium AI technology poster, black and gold color palette, futuristic interface elements, glowing data streams, cinematic depth, clean layout, high-end website hero visual, sharp details, professional design, dramatic lighting
comfy_negative: low quality, blurry, messy layout, watermark, random text, distorted logo, misspelled text, jpeg artifacts
native_prompt: Create a premium black-and-gold AI technology poster for a modern AI platform. It should feel futuristic, clean, high-end, and suitable for a website hero banner or WeChat cover. Use cinematic depth, subtle glowing data elements, and a strong visual center.

title: Anime Character Key Visual
original_prompt: Create a polished anime character key visual with expressive pose, clean linework, detailed costume, and dramatic lighting.
comfy_positive: anime character key visual, expressive pose, detailed costume design, clean line art, vibrant eyes, dramatic lighting, beautiful composition, high quality anime illustration, sharp details
comfy_negative: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, random text
native_prompt: Create a polished anime character key visual with expressive pose, detailed costume, clean linework, dramatic lighting, and strong composition. The result should look like a high-quality character design poster.

title: WeChat Article Cover
original_prompt: Create a clean, eye-catching social media article cover with a clear focal point, modern design, and strong readability.
comfy_positive: modern social media article cover, clean composition, strong focal point, premium editorial design, cinematic lighting, high readability, professional thumbnail, minimal layout, high-end visual design
comfy_negative: low quality, blurry, cluttered layout, unreadable text, watermark, distorted logo, random text
native_prompt: Create a clean and eye-catching article cover image with a clear focal point, modern editorial design, premium lighting, and enough empty space for title text. Avoid clutter and make it suitable for WeChat or blog publishing.
